tasks.subject: Task 0: Baseline + audit grep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock in green baseline test count + surface call sites the spec missed.

**Files:** read-only.

**Verify:** `pixi run test 2>&1 | tail -10` → "X passed".

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test 2>&1 | tail -10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pixi run test exits 0", "rg audit shows no surprise call sites"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Engine wait_for_ready — cancel_token kwarg (Protocol + 3 impls)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add cancel_token kwarg to wait_for_ready Protocol + ComfyUI/Diffusers/Fake impls; raise_if_set() at top of poll loop.

**Files:** interfaces.py, 3 engines, 3 new test files.

**Verify:** new + existing wait_for_ready tests pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/fake/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui_wait_for_ready_cancel.py", "tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready_cancel.py", "tests/engines/test_fake_wait_for_ready_cancel.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui_wait_for_ready_cancel.py tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready_cancel.py tests/engines/test_fake_wait_for_ready_cancel.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_wait_for_ready.py tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 engine impls accept cancel_token kwarg", "raise_if_set() at top of poll loop", "Protocol decl updated", "3 new test files pass", "existing wait_for_ready tests pass unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Engine provision() threads cancel_token
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GenerationEngine.provision() accepts cancel_token + threads into wait_for_ready call.

**Files:** interfaces.py + 3 engines.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/ -v` → all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/fake/__init__.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/ -v 2>&1 | tail -10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 provision impls accept cancel_token kwarg", "wait_for_ready called with cancel_token in 2 impls", "Protocol decls updated", "existing provision-branch tests pass unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: _provision_compute_once threads cancel_token
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Orchestrator helper accepts + forwards cancel_token to engine.provision(). Also adds cancel_token to _provision_instance_and_build_backend signature as interim plumbing.

**Verify:** orchestrator + session-claim + heartbeat tests pass unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_compute.py tests/core/test_orchestrator_session_claim.py tests/core/test_orchestrator_heartbeat.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_provision_compute_once accepts cancel_token kwarg", "engine.provision called with cancel_token", "_provision_instance_and_build_backend accepts cancel_token", "call sites compile", "existing tests pass unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: ProvisionResult NamedTuple + start_heartbeat closure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hoist hb_loop construction into a start_heartbeat closure invoked from _provision_instance_and_build_backend right after RunPod-status poll (orch:596). Returns ProvisionResult(instance, backend, hb_loop) NamedTuple.

**Verify:** 5 new c29 unit tests + existing heartbeat tests pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_c29_start_heartbeat.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_c29_start_heartbeat.py tests/core/test_orchestrator_compute.py tests/core/test_orchestrator_heartbeat.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ProvisionResult NamedTuple defined", "_build_start_heartbeat_closure helper added", "start_heartbeat kwarg on _provision_instance_and_build_backend", "closure invoked after status=ready before engine.provision", "returns ProvisionResult", "deploy_session wires closure to both call sites", "caller-supplied branch byte-identical", "5 new c29 unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Cancelled handling in _provision_instance_and_build_backend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** except Cancelled clause stops hb_loop + idempotent re-destroy pod. Operator-Ctrl-C-during-boot path destroys cleanly.

**Verify:** 3 new cancel-during-boot tests pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_c29_cancel_during_boot.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_c29_cancel_during_boot.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["except Cancelled clause added", "hb_loop.stop() called before destroy", "idempotent destroy_instance under Cancelled", "Cancelled import added", "3 new cancel-during-boot tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Update modified existing tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bring 7+ existing test files (creds_default, batch_creds_default, orchestrator_heartbeat, provision_branch fakes, audit set) back to green.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/ tests/engines/ -v` → all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/core/test_orchestrator_heartbeat.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_creds_default.py", "tests/core/test_batch_creds_default.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui_provision_branch.py", "tests/engines/test_diffusers_provision_branch.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_compute.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_no_reuse.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_session_claim.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_session_fields.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/ tests/engines/ -v 2>&1 | tail -15", "acceptanceCriteria": ["spy returns ProvisionResult", "fake wait_for_ready accepts cancel_token", "heartbeat timing assertions migrated", "auditor files pass", "no regressions in unchanged tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: RED-scaffold Smoke A (boot-phase STALL_REAP)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Committed RED smoke for boot-phase STALL_REAP. Lands BEFORE live spend per CLAUDE.md durability rule.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/live/test_c29_phase_a_boot_stall_live.py --collect-only` → 1 test collected.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_c29_phase_a_boot_stall_live.py", "tests/live/_c29_phase_a_cfg.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_c29_phase_a_boot_stall_live.py --collect-only", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke file with xfail+live markers", "cfg with stall_window_s=60, sleep 600 provision", "committed RED", "1 test collected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Live Smoke A execution
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run Smoke A against real RunPod; STALL_REAP fires; flip xfail → pass.

**Verify:** `KINOFORGE_LIVE=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_c29_phase_a_boot_stall_live.py -v` → PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_c29_phase_a_boot_stall_live.py", "tests/live/_c29_phase_a_evidence.json"], "verifyCommand": "KINOFORGE_LIVE=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_c29_phase_a_boot_stall_live.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preflight clean", "STALL_REAP fired", "consecutive_low_util_count >= 6", "elapsed < 300s", "xfail removed", "spend <= $0.20"]}
```
